message:
fix(cmd/bd): preserve repo config when reopening stores by path (PR #2628)

Several helper paths (list, completions, github, gitlab, linear) reopen
Dolt with only a raw path when the global store is nil. This loses
repo-local metadata like custom dolt_database names and server ports,
falling back to the wrong database or port.

Add a shared openReadOnlyStoreForDBPath() helper that maps dbPath back
to its owning .beads dir and reopens with full metadata. Also fix port
resolution in applyConfigDefaults to use BeadsDir (the .beads/ config
directory) instead of Path (the dolt data directory).

Fixes #2627

Co-Authored-By: Gary <gary@algorune.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,7 +7,6 @@ import (
 
 	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/beads"
-	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/storage/dolt"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/types"
 )
 
@@ -37,7 +36,7 @@ func issueIDCompletion(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string, toComplete string) ([]
 	currentStore := store
 	if currentStore == nil {
 		var err error
-		currentStore, err = dolt.New(ctx, &dolt.Config{Path: currentDBPath, ReadOnly: true})
+		currentStore, err = openReadOnlyStoreForDBPath(ctx, currentDBPath)
 		if err != nil {
 			// If we can't open database, return empty completion
 			return nil, cobra.ShellCompDirectiveNoFileComp

@@ -12,7 +12,6 @@ import (
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/config"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/debug"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/linear"
-	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/storage/dolt"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/tracker"
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/types"
 )
@@ -524,7 +523,7 @@ func getLinearConfig(ctx context.Context, key string) (value string, source stri
 			return value, "project config (bd config)"
 		}
 	} else if dbPath != "" {
-		tempStore, err := dolt.New(ctx, &dolt.Config{Path: dbPath})
+		tempStore, err := openReadOnlyStoreForDBPath(ctx, dbPath)
 		if err == nil {
 			defer func() { _ = tempStore.Close() }()
 			value, _ = tempStore.GetConfig(ctx, key) // Best effort: empty value is valid fallback
